title: satureja glabella
intro: Satureja glabella, also known as the Yemeni savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Satureja glabella include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating infections and wounds. Satureja glabella can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
